horoscope: You seek some form of emotional balance today, dear Aries. Physical pleasures and comfort are especially appealing, as today is often about enjoying the moment. Your instincts for money are strong right now. When it comes to your relationships, you find happiness in the little or simple things. As the day advances, sharing and connecting are stronger themes. This week is strong for seeking activities that engage your mind. While restlessness is possible, looking at things from a balanced perspective naturally builds your confidence. You seem to be on others’ radar, and you can find yourself in demand. Doing your share feels good, and focusing on stabilizing your social life or handling outstanding or unresolved issues related to friends or projects can lead to good things.

You're seeking clarity today, but you're also holding on to a dream or vision, dear Taurus. You have a stronger need for feelings to be acknowledged today, and you're able to get your message across. There is good energy for getting places in your conversations. Consider creative ways to connect, network, or simply share ideas. Later today, the Moon enters your resources sector, and you pay particular attention to what makes you feel most comfortable. You’re establishing your needs and wants and exploring ways to satisfy them at this time of the lunar month. You have a stronger sense of the long view, but you also recognize the need to strengthen your commitment to rest and reflection.

You can benefit greatly from spending some time free from interference today, dear Gemini. Later today, the Moon enters your sign, and you more thoroughly enjoy connecting with the world around you, but until then, some level of retreat helps you to restore balance and gain perspective. Later today, you're inclined to prioritize, focus, and deal with practical affairs with realism. This week holds good energy for arriving at an understanding with someone or about a long-standing problem. You persevere through problem areas that may have prevented you from moving on and expressing yourself authentically. You might boost a friendship through your new interests, beliefs, or studies. You’re likely to feel stronger as you learn valuable skills. You are a little braver than usual, particularly when it comes to entertaining new ideas or expressing your feelings.

This is a potentially strong day for socializing and brainstorming, dear Cancer. You can do some wonderfully creative thinking today. New ideas with long-term value can come to you now, and these are likely to be about the bigger picture rather than the details. Later today, taking a step back from the world in some meaningful way can be appropriate and replenishing. It’s a good time to catch your breath–you may need a little more time to yourself than usual. You might crave release from overstimulation. Still, you can feel stronger through your sense of responsibility or a feeling of direction this week. As you pay more attention to your duties, you feel more confident in yourself and your path. Efforts to get money or support sorted out can motivate you.

Your need to be productive is strong today, dear Leo. Good conversations can be enjoyed that help further your goals. There is a stronger focus on your goals and objectives, and meeting your responsibilities without delay can be satisfying. You can do some good thinking about your projects and goals. Later today, the Moon enters your social sector, however, and you're inclined to relax and look for inspiration. Transits this week are strong for solving a problem or coming up with a clever idea, particularly on practical levels. You might recognize that you’re growing through increased dedication and focus in your relationships.

Venturing beyond your routine is a strong draw today, dear Virgo. Seeking a higher level of freedom and well-being is likely. Conversations are likely to be rewarding and inspiring, and creative inspiration can come from a partner or close friend. Later today, with the Moon's move to the top of your solar chart, you feel more confident when you get in better touch with your goals. Going your own way in your work or with your routines is satisfying. This week, you're in great shape to boost your skills or your health, as you feel pleasantly dedicated to pursuing your wellness and work goals. At the same time, honing your ability to concentrate and sidestep distractions can be key.

Communications are not only friendly and fair today, dear Libra, but also quite helpful. Good energy is with you for developing a relationship and for research and development of a project. You are looking for experiences that are deeper, more meaningful, and more involving or absorbing than standard fare. Later today, you'll get in touch with your instincts and express yourself more naturally. You could feel a stronger desire for movement or variety. This week is strong for a more realistic and humble life strategy, and you're tuning in to this energy today. It’s a powerful time for authenticity, particularly in your relationships, partnerships, dating life, with children, and in your creative/leisure world.

You seek more balance in your life today, dear Scorpio, and you more fully appreciate the people in your life who are there for you. There can be satisfying conversations about creative or entertainment interests. It's a good time for keeping busy, even with a somewhat retiring disposition later today as the Moon heads into your solar eighth house. This week is strong for actively working at improving your home life or your feelings of security and comfort. You feel more emotionally fulfilled when you apply yourself to something that elevates your life. You can be quite determined to find answers to long-standing problems, and transits now can help you find good outlets for releasing tension. More dedication to your daily routines can motivate you in other areas of life as well.

It feels good and natural to pour more attention to the important systems and routines that keep your life running smoothly today, dear Sagittarius. Those things that keep you healthy and balanced are appealing now. There can be good conversations or ideas about how to make improvements to these things. Later today, the Moon heads into your partnership sector, and its transits support sharing, connecting, and enthusiasm for your interests and projects. This week, you're recognizing that more focus and dedication in your communications can benefit you and your relationships. In the same way, concentrating more when learning or connecting can greatly improve your experiences.

Conversations can quickly become creative and inspiring today, dear Capricorn. You might come to a better understanding or new insight that moves a relationship or a project to a whole new level. Today’s transits are also good for feeling stronger for your self-improvement efforts. It’s easier to see what needs improvement with your habits, daily life, and wellness. You can move mountains once you find your passion, and feeling on top of your practical affairs can be the key to freeing yourself up emotionally as the day advances, especially. This week, you might aim to find a better balance between personal interests and work duties if distractions are difficult to ignore.

You can benefit greatly from connecting with and finding your emotional center today, dear Aquarius. This can be a time of beautifying or bringing more excitement to the plain or ordinary elements of your personal environment. Doing something useful around the home can fill an emotional need today. Especially as the day advances, people in your life are more likely to appreciate your unique vision and perspective. Following a passion or a new interest can be exciting. This week is strong for applying yourself to a long-term project and for motivation levels, in general. You could have the information someone needs right now, and it’s satisfying.

This is a strong day for pouring more energy into your personal interests and projects, dear Pisces. You are more impressed by others' respect and honesty than by praise or niceties. Conversations and thoughts today can be particularly useful, as the pieces of a puzzle come together on a mental level. It's a generally fertile period for connecting with others and putting your feelers out for great ideas and potential interests. Later today, your need for security and comfort is more pronounced, and it can be a good time for emotional renewal if you’re determined to get it. Still, this week, you're particularly motivated to handle problem areas. Using your resources more effectively or making the most of what you already have can be satisfying right now.
